name: stackoverflow
description: Broad public Stack Overflow access for questions, answers, comments, users, tags, related content, and discovery.

runtime.auth_interaction: one normal Stack Overflow login when an account action first needs it

typed_fast_paths: users, user questions, and user answers
asking, answering, commenting, and voting with retained-session fkey handling
bounded read-only access to other public Stack Exchange API endpoints
coverage.website_parity: Public API reads are browserless. After one normal login or signup authorization, typed writes obtain the current fkey automatically. submit_form and the fixed-host direct workflow cover edits, flags, saves, moderation, and newly introduced same-site forms without a browser.
human_boundaries: password, CAPTCHA, OTP, email verification, and consent during account authorization
site privilege requirements for voting and moderation
constraints: Privileges and rate limits are enforced by Stack Overflow
other Stack Exchange domains need to be added to the adapter allowlist before agent navigation

search.description: Search Stack Overflow questions with optional tags and accepted-answer filtering.
search.when_to_use: Use this to search questions by keywords, with optional required tags and accepted-answer filtering.
search.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to read one question's answers; call question.

tagged.description: Required tags; repeat --tagged in the CLI

accepted_only.description: Only return questions with an accepted answer

questions.description: List Stack Overflow questions. The hot option reads and parses the website's current Trending page directly, preserving its order without consuming or depending on the shared Stack Exchange API quota.
questions.when_to_use: Use this to list questions by feed ordering such as hot, votes, or activity.
questions.when_not_to_use: Do not use this to search by keyword; call search.

api_get.description: Bounded read-only escape hatch for public Stack Exchange API endpoints not yet represented by a typed command. Paths stay fixed to api.stackexchange.com and only GET is allowed.

api_get.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for mutations; it is read-only.

ask.description: Ask a question through Stack Overflow's current authenticated form protocol. AgentWeb obtains fkey automatically; confirm is mandatory.
ask.when_to_use: Use this to ask a question via the authenticated form protocol; confirm is mandatory.
ask.when_not_to_use: Do not use this without confirm=true; posted questions are public and hard to remove.

confirm.description: Must be true to post the question

input.title: How do I stream rows from a large query?

errors.message: This operation changes remote state and requires confirm=true.
errors.user_action: Inspect the inputs and repeat the call with confirm set to true.

errors.message: This operation needs an authenticated Stack Overflow session.
errors.user_action: Run agentweb connect stackoverflow to authorize a session once, then retry.

errors.message: Stack Overflow requires a human verification step (CAPTCHA or challenge) to proceed.
errors.user_action: Complete the verification interactively in the browser, then retry.

errors.message: The account lacks the site reputation privilege required for this action.
errors.user_action: This action needs more reputation; it cannot be completed by this account.
